enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a life update vlog covering his bike time trial on haystack while high for a blood THC test, progress on his history/classics website, completing court-ordered community service picking up trash along Boulder Creek, financial plans around taking over a window-washing business, and goals for his website in the coming year.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: out of shape but his science/predictions about performance level were accurate
proud of its scope and unique single-page design but acknowledges it looks unfinished to outsiders
sympathetic and observational; views it as a cost-effective way to house people who don't want traditional life
plans to take over the window-washing business rather than sell his car, sees it as a path to stability while building YouTube/website income
putting all content of one book together on one page is superior to splitting by title

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels like he should do a video once a month.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle went for a blood test on September 9th to check THC levels.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle did the Haystack time trial on his bike while being super high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had double the amount of blood taken for the test because they lost the first sample.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle figured he would be in the fast commuter level, not the waste level, for the time trial.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle predicted he would be the alpha commuter, one step below a racer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's bike computer was broken, but the clock still worked, though it was wrong.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle filmed the Haystack time trial and plans to include the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle took a wrong turn during the time trial but corrected it quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle finished the time trial in 41 minutes, putting him second to last on the Haystack time trial leaderboard.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's science worked out as he predicted his performance accurately.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle hasn't had the motivation to sell his car yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels his website is a paradox because it's big but not fully done.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to include entire books like Livy's History of Rome and Thucydides' History of the Peloponnesian War on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes his website is the only one in the world with entire books on one page, allowing for word searches.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle finished his community service by picking up trash around Boulder Creek.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle found needles and a pile of clothing while picking up trash.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle observed that homeless people organize their sleeping areas with rocks and bushes for comfort.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks homeless people living outdoors is a cost-effective way to take care of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to sell his car to solve his money problems.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle worked as a window washer for five seasons between 2007 and 2015.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle hopes to become financially independent through his YouTube channel and website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has been sleep-deprived due to work and insomnia.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to activate legislative sanctum onion musical in January 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle aims to organize his website so entire books are on one page for easier access.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels his website is undervalued and still in the data collection stage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes his website is getting out of the data collection stage quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to explain his free audiobook page and organize books on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels his website is improving rapidly since getting a faster computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks his website is better organized than others, especially compared to the Bible.
